title: Fox Sickle
description: This texture pack adds a sickle to the game.
body:
## This texture pack requires _CIT Resewn_

This texture pack is for Foxking1234 as comissioned. However, anyone else can use it.

This texture pack offers a simple sickle custom made for the comssioner... That's it there's nothing really special about it.

Rename any sword/axe to "Fox Sickle", and the items model will be that of the sickle.

Support me on [ko-fi](https://ko-fi.com/quayru)!

![Sickle on anvile](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1a271353ac8027948c963203d7de3a65755df108.png)
